attributes.description: Alerts when any TLS cert served by Traefik expires within 30 days. Expiry breaks client TLS.
attributes.name: [Traefik OTel] TLS certificate expiry imminent

investigation_guide.blob:
## Traefik TLS certificate expiry imminent

### What fired
TLS cert expiry less than 30 days for a (cn, serial) pair.

### Why it matters
Expired TLS certs cause handshake failures on Traefik's entrypoints. Renewal usually automated via ACME.

### Triage
1. Identify the specific cert.
2. Inspect ACME / external issuer state.

### Remediation
- Force-renew the cert.

### Tuning
- 30 days lead; use shorter for short-lived certs.
